creator: bofh@freebsd.org
text:
(In reply to Wout Decré from comment #7)
Looks like opcache and ASLR actually do not play well. Although it was mentioned for php7 but it might be that it still exists for now.
Rather than disabling ASLR entirely can you check whether if this works:
elfctl -e +noaslr /usr/local/sbin/httpd
